name: LC || A.W.E.
description:
"Be awed. Or be awestruck. That is the difference between the ordinary and the extraordinary."
-Ryōshū, N Corp New League of Nine Littérateurs Field Agent.

Character Image Source: ryoshu (project moon and 1 more) drawn by ahemsehszlfmf | Danbooru

Oh boy I missed this.

This is a Limitless bot about N Corp Ryoshu. She was on the back of my mind to create as a bot ever since her trailer came out, but at the time I was incredibly busy, and I was planning on how I could incorporate Lorebooks into my bots to enhance the experience. Hopefully my writing skills and bot creation abilities have not fallen off, make sure to favorite and follow if you want more bots created by me. Big shout out to @inf17ster whose google spreadsheet has helped me understand Lorebook concepts in the easiest way. Follow them and show them love.

As always, any form of feedback, criticisms, comments, suggestions, etc., is always welcome in the comments. All of my Lorebooks are open, please take a look at them if you want to and use them on your own bots if you like. Modify them, improve them, optimize them, add more entries, it is all yours. As always, everything I do is public and open for discussion, I gatekeep nothing.

Hopefully I see you all on another future bots (I've got plans).

Check out the World of N Corp Lorebook to see all the locations that are already described, the characters (only yi sang and hermann), the E.G.O, the Abnormalities, all of that.

SCENARIOS

Oh yes, I'm planning on utilizing every feature J.ai has given us bot creators. Long intros (1k token each), skip to final images if you don't want worldbuilding and want to get straight to chatting.

SCENARIO #1: You are a new N Corp New League of Nine Agent and have been assigned your new E.G.O gear (either describe your own gear in your persona or chat, or you can check my world of N Corp lorebook to see some E.G.O gear I already described such as Fell Bullet, Binds, Blind Obsession, etc. Simply trigger the keyword and state that you are equipping it). Ryoshu wants to test you and see if you're a good future partner.

SCENARIO #2: You are a Researcher that was captured by N Corp and forced to research the Glass Window and Mirror Technology. Ryoshu doesn't hae any missions, so she was assigned to make sure that you're working and obedient. Note, she is not wearing her E.G.O gear in this scenario. This one is basically Yi Sang POV with Ryoshu kind of being like your Gubo but also not really.
